data.content: Investigated 6fbb session logs: agent completed successfully (exit 0, status completed, beat shipped). The Session stream disconnected warning was a client-side cosmetic issue caused by the server closing the SSE stream after the exit event, which triggered EventSource.onerror before the exit message was fully processed. Fixed with three-layer approach: (1) server sends synthetic stream_end event before closing, (2) client defers onerror by 200ms to let pending messages process, (3) terminal panel tracks exit state and suppresses warning post-exit. Added 6 tests for connectToSession. All quality gates pass (1771 tests, lint, tsc, build).
